about: SYNTHETIC-but-representative retrieval eval for DARWIN/MNEMOSYNE personal-assistant memory. Author-written facts + labeled queries (Claude, 2026-07-18). Directional evidence for a build/no-build call on a dedicated Core ML embedder; NOT ground-truth production data. Facts are the kind DARWIN stores (preferences, people, events, places, projects, device/config, habits). Many near-distractors share vocabulary with a relevant fact but differ in meaning, so lexical overlap alone will not win. Queries paraphrase the facts (not verbatim).

facts.text: The user's sister Maya was born on March 3rd, 1994.
The user's younger brother Leo lives in Berlin and works as an architect.
The user's mother, Elena, is a retired high school chemistry teacher.
The user's closest friend from university is named Priya Raman.
The user's daughter Sofia just started third grade.
The user's manager at work is Daniel Ortiz.
The user's dentist is Dr. Chen, with an office on Fillmore Street.
The user's neighbor Tom waters the plants whenever they travel.
The user's wedding anniversary is on July 12th.
The user has a dentist appointment scheduled for the 23rd of this month.
Maya's birthday party is planned for the first weekend of March.
The user is flying to Tokyo on October 8th for a two-week trip.
The user's passport expires in February 2027.
The quarterly board review at work is held on the last Friday of each quarter.
The user's gym membership renews automatically every January.
The spare house key is hidden under the blue flowerpot on the front porch.
The spare car key is kept in the second kitchen drawer next to the sink.
The user parks in spot B14 in the office garage.
The user's favorite coffee shop is Rook and Bean on Elm Street.
The user grew up in Lisbon, Portugal.
The user's vacation cabin is near Lake Tahoe.
The user keeps important paperwork in the fireproof box in the hall closet.
The user always books flights on Delta Air Lines.

The user drinks oat-milk cortados and never regular coffee.
The user is vegetarian but eats fish occasionally.

The user's favorite author is Ursula K. Le Guin.
The user enjoys jazz, especially John Coltrane.
The user's go-to weeknight dinner is a lentil curry.
The user's main project at work is codenamed Project DARWIN.
Project DARWIN is a privacy-first on-device assistant.
The user is writing a science-fiction novel called The Tidal Archive.
The user's current side project is a woodworking build of a walnut desk.
The user is learning to play the upright bass this year.

The user's laptop is an Apple MacBook Pro with an M1 Pro chip and 16 GB of memory.
The user's phone is an iPhone 15 in titanium blue.

The user's work email runs on the corporate Outlook server.
The user backs up photos to an external 4-terabyte drive every Sunday.
The user's password manager is 1Password.
The user's default browser is Firefox.
The user goes for a run every morning before 7 a.m.
The user meditates for ten minutes before bed.
The user does the grocery shopping on Saturday mornings.
The user takes vitamin D with breakfast.
The user usually works late on Thursday nights.
The user's cat is named Pixel and is a gray tabby.
The user's dog, a beagle named Scout, needs medication twice a day.
The user's father, Carlos, lives in Porto and loves fishing.
The user's coworker Aisha handles the design side of Project DARWIN.
The user's landlord is named Mr. Whitfield.
The user has a dermatologist appointment next Tuesday at 2 p.m.
The user's car is due for an oil change at 45,000 miles.
The user's apartment lease is up for renewal at the end of August.
The user's flight to Tokyo departs from gate 42 at 6 a.m.
The user's daughter Sofia has a piano recital in May.
The user's office is on the 9th floor of the Harborview building downtown.
The user's favorite hiking trail is the Ridgeline Loop.
The user stores winter clothes in the attic.
The user's PO box is number 3382 at the Elm Street post office.
The user takes their tea with a slice of lemon and no sugar.
The user's favorite film is Blade Runner.
The user prefers text messages over phone calls.
The user likes window seats on short domestic flights.
The user's phone is set to vibrate only during work hours.
The user's walnut desk build is waiting on a new set of chisels.
The user's novel The Tidal Archive is set on a flooded future Earth.
The user volunteers at the community coding club on alternate Fridays.
The user is training for a half-marathon in the fall.
The user's smart thermostat is a Nest model.
The user's tablet is an iPad Air used mainly for sketching.
The user's car is a 2019 Subaru Outback in forest green.
The user's guest Wi-Fi password rotates every month.
The user's work laptop runs a locked-down corporate image.
The user drinks two liters of water throughout the workday.
The user journals every Sunday evening.
The user avoids screens for the first hour after waking up.

The user takes the 8:15 train into the city on weekdays.
The user is allergic to shellfish, diagnosed as a child.

The user's coffee grinder is a Baratza Encore.
The user's houseplants include a fiddle-leaf fig and two pothos.
The user's preferred airport lounge is the one in Terminal 2.

The user's monthly budget review happens on the first of the month.

The user's streaming profile is the one labeled with a fox icon.
The user's parents' anniversary is in September.
The user's sister Maya works as a marine biologist in San Diego.
